title: OpenTelemetry Integration Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for adding OpenTelemetry distributed tracing, metrics export, and trace context propagation to the server.
notes: Path under docs/plans/ and prose-plus-code implementation guide structure (goal, tasks, steps) indicate a planning/how-to DOC rather than a locked decision (ADR), requirements (PRD), or a contract (SPEC).
